Author: Ulanzi Dev
Name: GCP Monitor
Description: Monitor Google Cloud resources on a key: Compute Engine VMs and Cloud SQL databases. Pick up to 2 metrics per key (or 3 when the name is hidden) from CPU, RAM, Disk and Connections. Switch between logged-in gcloud accounts; click to refresh all keys or open the resource in the console. Alerts when the resource is down or has no data in the last minutes.

Actions.Name: VM / Cloud SQL
Actions.Tooltip: Monitor CPU, RAM, Disk (and Connections for Cloud SQL) of a GCP Compute Engine VM or Cloud SQL instance
